mapper.select: SELECT pm.party_id AS party_id, pc.id AS party_cycle_id, pm.id AS member_id, pm.user_id AS user_id, bk.billing_key AS billing_key, bk.customer_key AS customer_key, pc.price_per_member_snapshot AS amount FROM party_member pm INNER JOIN billing_key bk ON bk.user_id = pm.user_id INNER JOIN party_cycle pc ON pc.party_id = pm.party_id WHERE pm.party_id = #{partyId} AND pc.id = #{partyCycleId} AND pm.role = #{memberRole} AND pm.status = #{memberStatus} AND bk.status = #{billingKeyStatus} ORDER BY pm.id ASC

SELECT pm.party_id AS party_id, pc.id AS party_cycle_id, pm.id AS member_id, pm.user_id AS user_id, bk.billing_key AS billing_key, bk.customer_key AS customer_key, pc.price_per_member_snapshot AS amount FROM party_member pm INNER JOIN billing_key bk ON bk.user_id = pm.user_id INNER JOIN party_cycle pc ON pc.party_id = pm.party_id WHERE pm.party_id = #{partyId} AND pc.id = #{partyCycleId} AND pm.role = #{memberRole} AND pm.status = 'ACTIVE' AND bk.status = #{billingKeyStatus} ORDER BY pm.id ASC
